overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Kronenwetter Police and Fire Commission was scheduled to meet to approve April meeting minutes, conduct a closed session interview for a Fire Department applicant, and elect new commission leadership. The meeting was set to address personnel and administrative matters for the village's police and fire services.

agenda.item: Closed session for consideration of Fire Department applicant interview
Election of Police and Fire Commission President and Vice-President

discussions.body: The commission was scheduled to review and approve the minutes from the April 27, 2026 meeting. This procedural item was set for formal approval at the start of the meeting.

discussions.item: Closed session for Fire Department applicant interview
discussions.body: The commission was scheduled to convene in closed session pursuant to Wisconsin Statute 19.85(1)(c) to interview a Fire Department applicant. The closed session was set to allow discussion of employment-related matters in accordance with state law.

discussions.item: Election of Police and Fire Commission President and Vice-President
discussions.body: The commission was scheduled to elect new leadership positions, specifically a President and Vice-President. This election was set as new business to be conducted following the closed session.

publicComment: Public comment was scheduled on the agenda, with a 15-minute total time limit and a three-minute time period per person, with possible extension at the Chief Presiding Officer's discretion.
actionItems: Scheduled to vote on approval of April 27, 2026 meeting minutes
Scheduled to elect Police and Fire Commission President
Scheduled to elect Police and Fire Commission Vice-President
Expected to consider action items arising from closed session
title: Police and Fire Commission Meeting - 2026-06-01
